entities.teacher: a female teacher in a blue blouse
entities.boy_glasses: a short boy with round glasses
entities.girl_headband: a girl with a red headband

scenes.title: The Classroom
scenes.background_prompt: A bright elementary school classroom with a whiteboard at the front, three wooden desks arranged in a row, a globe on a side table, and a tall bookshelf filled with colorful books. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A bright elementary school classroom. A female teacher in a blue blouse and gray skirt stands near a whiteboard at the front, gesturing with one hand as if explaining something. Three students sit at wooden desks arranged in a row facing the whiteboard. On the left, a tall girl with long brown braids and a green sweater sits up straight. In the middle, a short boy with round glasses, messy dark hair, and a red polo shirt leans forward over his notebook. On the right, a girl with a red headband, shoulder-length blonde hair, and a purple cardigan rests her chin on her hand. A globe sits on a small table by the window to the left. A tall wooden bookshelf packed with colorful books lines the back wall. The whiteboard has simple math equations written in blue marker.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place teacher near the whiteboard (front), standing and gesturing with one hand. Place girl_braids at the left desk, sitting upright. Place boy_glasses at the middle desk, leaning forward over a notebook. Place girl_headband at the right desk, resting chin on hand.
